title: Plan-version supersession surface applicability is a design determination (build-mode ruling)
mode: BUILD-MODE (build controller makes the design/governance call to keep momentum; fuller Eye-governance re-engages before ship/enrollment)
ruling: The per-entity-kind supersession surface applicability is a TECHNICAL DESIGN determination resolved by peer-model collaboration with codex (the peer planning/dev model) — NOT a CHANGE-PROTOCOL amendment. A plan-version is not a weave node kind, so its weave-supersedes-edge and SUPERSEDED-record surfaces are STRUCTURALLY INAPPLICABLE (a verified fact), not demoted; its normative surface is the CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json#superseded entry. Weave-node-backed retirement remains all-three-surface (deferred in cycle-1 as UNREPRESENTABLE under the plan-only schema).
authority: build controller in build mode (The Eye/coordinator recalibration 2026-07-18: internal-governance micro-decisions are portfolio set-dressing; build mode makes them). NOT a live-stakes governance amendment. Re-engages Eye governance at ship (enrollment + durable trust-root).
